title: Planet Da Lou
content:
Planet Dao Lou
 came from an illusionary planet that is always burning in the Brilliant Void Hell. That illusionary planet was very large, thousands of times larger than 
Planet Tian Yun
.

Planet Dao Lou was refined as a sword by 
Master Void Spirit
 of the 
Brilliant Void Cultivation Sect
. Due to an incident, the illusionary planet collapsed, and planet Da Lou is a fragment from the collapsed planet.
